title: Terry leaves field and Jerry stays on field

card.rawText: During your turn, you may place a "Jerry" card under this card. Then, double this creature's base AL, SPD, Atk Dice Rolls, and Modifier. If this card leaves the field or changes control, "Jerry" stays on the field. (This effect cannot stack).

plan.title: Terry leaves field and Jerry stays on field
plan.summary: Attach Jerry under Terry, remove Terry from the field, and verify Jerry remains on the field instead of following Terry.

notes: Pre-place Jerry under Terry, then invalidate Terry.

steps: Set Terry as player_1 primary creature.
Verify Jerry remains on player_1's field.
manualVerification: Confirm the same behavior occurs if Terry changes control instead of leaving the field.
riskNotes: This fixture models the leave-field cleanup path; change-control cleanup is noted as a manual follow-up.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Terry detach cleanup leaves Jerry on field.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
